LInclusion , XMPPSink , XMPPSource , XSLTransformer , XYPlotter , XYScope , ZeroOrderHold public interface TypedActor extends Actor A TypedActor is an actor whose ports have types. This interface defines the method to get type constraints from an a

ines the method to get type constraints from an actor. The ports on a TypedActor are constrained to be TypedIOPorts. Since: Ptolemy II 0.2 Version: $Id$ Author: Yuhong Xiong, Marten Lohstroh See Also: TypedCompositeActor , TypedAtomicActor , TypedI
